titleStmt.title: SII 34.367: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 367. Kunnāṇḍārkōyil, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the second gōpura, right of entrance, in the Parvatagirīśvara temple.

summary.p: This is in two but related bits, with the middle portion missing. Seems to record gift of all the taxes by the king on some village for the expenses of some service instituted in his name by the nāṭṭār of some locality (name lost). A number of taxes is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ kOnEriṉmaiy
koṇṭāṉ paṉaṅkāṭu nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruk
kamē ṭaiya nāyaṉār kōyit tāṉattārkku
ḻavaḷa nāṭṭu nāṭṭār Iṉnāyaṉārkku nampērāl

Āṟuṅkālun turavum maramum Uṭpaṭṭa maṟṟum Ep
pēṟpaṭṭa samasta prāptikaḷum kaṭamai Antarāyam
kāriya Ārāyci nelvari poṉ vari kācukaṭamai mā
vaṭai puṉpayir taṟi Iṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭ
ṭārp pāṭṭam Ērvari Iṉavari Iṭaivari maṉaivari
ḷpāṭṭam kāṇikkai kāttikai paccai pañcupīli
Ōlai Eḻuttu viṉivōkam vācalppēṟu Ilāñca
ṉaippēṟu veṭṭikkāṇi Āṭtēvai taccuttē
vai Āṉaiccālai kutiraippanti Uṭpaṭṭa maṟṟum Eṟpē
rpaṭṭa tēvaikaḷum Iṟaiyiliyum Aiñcāvatu Etir
Iraṇṭāvatu Aiṟpaci mātam mutal mutalp paṅku Iṟai
yiliyāka tantu Ippaṭikku variyilār kaṇakkilum ka
ḻikkac coṉṉōm Ivvōlaiyē piṭipāṭāka
kkoṇṭu cantrādityavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempi
lum veṭṭi tiruccūlasthāpanamum paṇṇikkoṇ
ṭu Innilam kuṟuvai ru pūcittaraikkāl E ṟuṅ
kutūṅku pullu cā kuppaṭa maṟ pe
raṇṭu Ippe
Digital edition of SII 34.367 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
